footer.tagline: Precision-engineered automotive components for domestic and international markets.

home.hero_body: Precision-manufactured automotive rims and parts from Jashore, Bangladesh. ISO 9001:2015 · ISO 14001:2015 · ISO 45001:2018 certified.
home.about_body_1: Modina Rim & Parts Ltd. is a premier manufacturer of automotive components in Bangladesh. Specializing in high-tensile rims for motorcycles and commercial three-wheelers, our facility in Jashore combines advanced CNC machining with rigorous quality control.
home.about_body_2: We don't just manufacture parts; we engineer reliability. Every component that leaves our facility is tested to withstand the demanding conditions of South Asian roads.
home.features_quality_desc: Triple ISO certified manufacturing with 100% batch testing for dimensional accuracy and tensile strength.
home.features_scale_desc: Automated production lines ensuring consistent tolerance across high-volume orders.
home.features_support_desc: Direct access to our engineering team for custom specifications and volume requirements.
home.cat_premium_desc: High-tensile alloy and steel rims for commercial applications.
home.cat_hardware_desc: Nuts, bolts, and specialized fasteners for automotive assembly.
home.cat_cng_desc: Heavy-duty components engineered for three-wheeler fleets.
home.cat_moto_desc: Durable aftermarket replacement parts for major motorcycle brands.
home.cta_title: Ready to upgrade your supply chain?
home.cta_body: Contact our sales team today for a comprehensive product catalog, volume pricing, and custom manufacturing inquiries.

about.intro_body_1: Modina Rim & Parts Ltd. was founded with a singular vision: to elevate the standard of automotive component manufacturing in Bangladesh. From our state-of-the-art facility in Jashore, we produce high-tensile rims, precision hardware, and specialized parts for both domestic and international markets.
about.intro_body_2: Our journey from a local supplier to an internationally recognized, triple ISO-certified manufacturer is built on a foundation of uncompromising quality control, continuous technological investment, and a deep understanding of our customers' operational needs.
about.video_desc: Take a look inside our BSCIC Industrial Area facility, where advanced machinery meets rigorous quality control.
about.hero_banner_desc: Modina Rim & Parts Ltd. — Est. 2010 — Jashore, Bangladesh
about.val_1_desc: Every component is engineered to micro-millimeter accuracy. We believe precision is not optional — it is the foundation of trust.
about.val_2_desc: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of quality and transparency. Our ISO 9001:2015 certification is proof, not a promise.
about.val_3_desc: From our founding, we have continuously invested in new technologies and processes to stay ahead of global manufacturing standards.
about.ms_1_desc: Established in Jhumjhumpur, Jashore with a focus on bicycle, rickshaw and motorcycle parts.
about.ms_2_desc: Began exporting to neighboring countries in South Asia.
about.ms_3_desc: Expanded operations at BSCIC Industrial Area with new precision manufacturing equipment.
about.ms_4_desc: Achieved ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certifications — all in one year.
about.ms_5_desc: Launched 21+ product lines covering motorcycle parts, rims, and hardware for the regional market.
